title: All Is Well
overview: Mumbai-the city of dreams. Three strangers, one wild ride. Scams, an ATM robbery, and a gangster with taste. Chaos turns into comedy as Amar, Akbar and Anthony take on the city. Unfiltered fun, unstoppable laughter-its all here.
